Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT baseline.bldg_id, baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", baseline.state 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline 
WHERE baseline.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (baseline.bldg_id, baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", baseline.state) IN (SELECT upgrade.bldg_id, upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", upgrade.state 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade 
WHERE upgrade.upgrade IN (2) AND upgrade.applicability = true GROUP BY upgrade.bldg_id, upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", upgrade.state 
HAVING count(distinct(upgrade.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/de08b0fd3505106491e1c3a89c5007cd5c61a3018bcfbb5bfd748988ae33d2ed/4d18eb4a-09bf-4832-817a-5a5f16d6a22e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
